title: Senior Software Engineer - Airtel India Capital India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Airtel India Capital India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Airtel India Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Bhopal-based team.

About Airtel India Capital India:
Airtel India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India Capital India!
